New iOS App

New iOS Members Card App

Redesigned Central Henderson mobile experience — full iOS-native feel with Members Card Portal, giving, care, community, and journey screens.

iOS Native Members Card Giving Central Henderson

Scan to Preview

Open on your mobile device

Scan with your phone camera, then log in or sign up for your member account.

App URL

Share with members

gracecrm-centralhenderson.org /grace_central_henderson_members_card_ios_app.html
Open in New Tab
Best for member rollout: scan the QR code, then log in or create a member account from your phone.
